puzzle.hint: The honored status of those who sacrifice their lives for the sake of Allah - they are not gone, but alive with their Lord, receiving their reward.
puzzle.arabic: وَلَا تَحْسَبَنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ قُتِلُوا۟ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ أَمْوَٰتًۢا ۚ بَلْ أَحْيَآءٌ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ يُرْزَقُونَ
puzzle.verseEn: And never think of those who have been killed in the cause of Allāh as dead. Rather, they are alive with their Lord, receiving provision,
